title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 33: The World
description: Chapter 33 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 33 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: The methods of the Way are many. All of them have something to commend them. But where does completeness lie? Where does perfection lie? Where do men of old find the source of all this? They said, 'There is no place it is not present.'
